name: Zhuhai Zhongfu Enterprise Co.,Ltd
summary: Zhuhai Zhongfu Enterprise Co.,Ltd manufactures and sells beverage packaging solutions in China. It offers polyethylene terephthalate (PET) bottles for carbonated soft drinks, drinking water, beer, sauces and jams, edible oils, and wine; PET preforms; PVC/OPP labels; heat shrinkable plastic films; caps; and cartons, as well as OEM services. The company was founded in 1982 and is based in Zhuhai, China.
